mapper.sql: id, uploadtime, lastruntime,perflastruntime,username, scriptname, interfacename, scripttype, operationtype, scriptpath, runbutton, scriptrunorder, testname0, testname1, testname2, testname3, urL0, urL1, urL2, urL3, urL0replace, urL1replace, urL2replace, urL3replace, `state`,interstate
mapper.select:
select
from upload_info order by id desc limit 0,1
mapper.update: update upload_info set state = #{state,jdbcType=VARCHAR},perflastruntime = #{perflastruntime,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
update upload_info set interstate = #{interstate,jdbcType=VARCHAR},lastruntime = #{lastruntime,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
update upload_info set interstate = #{interstate,jdbcType=VARCHAR},lastruntime = #{lastruntime,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( select * from upload_info order by id DESC )t
order by id DESC
mapper.insert: insert into upload_info (uploadtime, lastruntime, username, scriptname, interfacename, scripttype, operationtype, scriptpath, runbutton, scriptrunorder, testname0, testname1, testname2, testname3, urL0, urL1, urL2, urL3, urL0replace, urL1replace, urL2replace, urL3replace, state) values (#{uploadtime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lastruntime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{scriptname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{interfacename,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{scripttype,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{operationtype,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{scriptpath,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{runbutton,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{scriptrunorder,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{testname0,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{testname1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{testname2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{testname3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{url0,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{url1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{url2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{url3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{url0replace,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{url1replace,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{url2replace,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{url3replace,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{state,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into upload_info
id,
uploadtime,
lastruntime,
username,
scriptname,
interfacename,

urL1,
urL2,
urL3,

urL1replace,
urL2replace,
urL3replace,
`state`,

mapper.update:
update upload_info
uploadtime = #{uploadtime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
lastruntime = #{lastruntime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
username = #{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
scriptname = #{scriptname,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
interfacename = #{interfacename,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
scripttype = #{scripttype,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
operationtype = #{operationtype,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
scriptpath = #{scriptpath,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
runbutton = #{runbutton,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
scriptrunorder = #{scriptrunorder,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
testname0 = #{testname0,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
testname1 = #{testname1,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
testname2 = #{testname2,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
testname3 = #{testname3,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
urL0 = #{url0,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
urL1 = #{url1,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
urL2 = #{url2,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
urL3 = #{url3,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
urL0replace = #{url0replace,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
urL1replace = #{url1replace,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
urL2replace = #{url2replace,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
urL3replace = #{url3replace,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
`state` = #{state,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update upload_info set uploadtime = #{uploadtime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, lastruntime = #{lastruntime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, username = #{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, scriptname = #{scriptname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, interfacename = #{interfacename,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, scripttype = #{scripttype,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, operationtype = #{operationtype,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, scriptpath = #{scriptpath,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, runbutton = #{runbutton,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, scriptrunorder = #{scriptrunorder,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, testname0 = #{testname0,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, testname1 = #{testname1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, testname2 = #{testname2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, testname3 = #{testname3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, urL0 = #{url0,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, urL1 = #{url1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, urL2 = #{url2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, urL3 = #{url3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, urL0replace = #{url0replace,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, urL1replace = #{url1replace,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, urL2replace = #{url2replace,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, urL3replace = #{url3replace,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `state` = #{state,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
